channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: 7.0 earthquake off Northern California prompts brief tsunami warning
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A 7.0 magnitude earthquake shook a large area of Northern California on Thursday, knocking items off grocery store shelves, sending children scrambling under desks and prompting a brief tsunami warning for 5.3 million people along the U.S. West Coast.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are bringing Trump's DOGE to Capitol Hill
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Billionaire Elon Musk and fellow entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy spent several hours Thursday swapping ideas with lawmakers about President-elect Donald Trump'sDOGE initiative to dismantle parts of the federal government.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Secret Service director touts changes as Congress presses him on Trump assassination attempt
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The acting director of the Secret Service said Thursday that the agency is “reorganizing and reimagining” its culture and how it operates following an assassination attempt against Donald Trump on the campaign trail.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: At a sinkhole above an abandoned Pennsylvania coal mine, hopes of a rescue dwindle
item.description: Three days after a Pennsylvania woman searching for her cat disappeared at the chasm of a three-story deep sinkhole, the digging crews were back at it Thursday, hoping for a miracle but expecting to recover her remains.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tsunami warning canceled after strong California earthquake
item.description: The National Weather Service canceled a tsunami warning Thursday for a large stretch of California coastline, saying the threat had passed following a strong earthquake near Eureka.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield reverses decision to cap anesthesia coverage after a set time limit
item.description: Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield said in a statement that its decision to backpedal resulted from “significant widespread misinformation” about the policy.
item.dc:creator: Melanie Higgins, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois homeowner feels underground mine is splitting her house in two
item.description: About 330,000 Illinois homes sit on top of old abandoned mines. Some say their homes are sinking because of it.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hayes, KRON4

item.title: Democratic rep pushes Biden to issue blanket pardon to those Patel could target
item.description: He noted that law enforcement officers, military personnel and others are at risk of extreme legal battles.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Hegseth slams 'manufactured media takedown' of him in WSJ op-ed
item.description: Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump's pick to lead the Defense Department, condemned the press for what he described as a "manufactured media takedown" of him. "The press is peddling anonymous story after anonymous story, all meant to smear me and tear me down.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Concerns mount over Musk’s taste for revenge
item.description: Concerns were amplified last week after Musk went after retired Army Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, who became an outspoken critic of President-elect Trump after testifying in his first impeachment trial.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ammunition from UnitedHealthcare CEO shooting had words written on it: sources
item.description: Bullets found on the ground where UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson was shot Wednesday had writing on them, sources told Nexstar's WPIX.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Kala Rama, WGN 9

item.title: Bitcoin hits $100,000 after Trump names pro-crypto SEC chair
item.description: The former president is bolstering the evolving platform amidst the threat of new currency systems seeking to challenge the U.S. dollar.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift 'Eras' tie-in book is a smash, selling more than 800,000 copies in first weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Just one retail chain was enough for Taylor Swift to have the top-selling book last week and the biggest publishing launch of 2024. According to Circana, Swift's “Eras Tour Book” sold 814,000 copies over the Thanksgiving holiday weekend.
item.dc:creator: HILLEL ITALIE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Memphis police use excessive force and discriminate against Black people, Justice Department finds
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — The Memphis Police Department uses excessive force and discriminates against Black people, according to the findings of a U.S. Department of Justice investigation launched after the beating death of Tyre Nichols after a traffic stop in 2023.
item.dc:creator: ADRIAN SAINZ, JONATHAN MATTISE and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge considers first lawsuit to overturn Missouri's near-total abortion ban
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Abortion-rights advocates on Wednesday asked a judge to overturn Missouri’s near-total ban on the procedure, less than a month after voters backed an abortion-rights constitutional amendment. Jackson County Circuit Judge Jerri Zhang did not immediately rule after the hearing.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hegseth nomination sinking fast in the Senate
item.description: Senate Republicans say Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s choice to head the Defense Department, faces a very tough path to confirmation in the Senate and his bleak prospects have been communicated directly to the Trump transition team, which is now mulling other options.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Search intensifies for missing Pennsylvania grandmother as crews encounter unstable mine shafts
item.description: The search for Pennsylvania grandmother Elizabeth Pollard continued on Wednesday. Pollard, 64, is believed to have fallen into a sinkhole on Dec. 2 while searching for her pet.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump’s pick to run the DEA withdraws his name from consideration. Trump says he pulled the plug
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chad Chronister, Donald Trump's pick to run the Drug Enforcement Administration, has withdrawn his name from consideration for the job, becoming the second person selected by the president-elect to bow out quickly after being selected for a position requiring Senate confirmation.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Search for woman who may have fallen into sinkhole continues amid safety concerns
item.description: Rescuers contemplated the safest way Wednesday to search for a woman who apparently fell into a Pennsylvania sinkhole while looking for her lost cat, saying a crumbling old coal mine beneath the surface was complicating efforts and endangering workers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump team outlines inauguration benefits for donors
item.description: The team highlighted that committee members who give $1 million or raise $2 million receive six tickets to access exclusive inaugural events between Saturday, Jan. 18, and Monday, Jan. 20, the day of the swearing-in.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: British indie rock band robbed at gunpoint in California '10 minutes into US tour,' group says
item.description: Sports Team, a six-piece London-based alternative rock band, had stopped for coffee when someone alerted them that their van was being ransacked by robbers, according to their latest Instagram post.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, Fox 5

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO fatally shot in 'targeted attack' in NYC, officials say
item.description: The CEO of UnitedHealthcare was killed in a Midtown shooting Wednesday morning, sources have confirmed to Nexstar's WPIX.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, KRON4

item.title: No winner for Mega Millions, jackpot grows to $579 million
item.description: No one won the Mega Millions drawing on Tuesday night. The jackpot has now grown to an estimated $579 million ahead of the next drawing on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Knight, ABC 4

item.title: Max to begin cracking down on password sharing next week
item.description: Max will begin its password-sharing crackdown next week, beginning with "very early, gentle messaging" directed at high-usage users.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, ABC 4

item.title: Great Lakes region braces for more snow while cleaning up after lake-effect storms
item.description: Even more snow could be on the way for places in the Great Lakes region that are still digging out after days of storms caused deadly wrecks, collapsed a barn on top of 100 cows and buried some towns under nearly 6 feet (1.8 meters).
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Train slams into stuck semi-truck in Pennsylvania
item.description: City police believe the truck got hung up on the snow and the driver couldn't pull away before having to exit the cab before the train struck.
item.dc:creator: Bill Palmer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California teacher dies after suspected bat bite in her classroom
item.description: A central California middle school teacher died after contracting rabies from a suspected bat bite, local health officials said.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Trump says he would block US Steel acquisition by Nippon Steel
item.description: The Japanese firm announced last year that it would acquire U.S. Steel Corp. in a $14.9 billion deal — a move that was sharply criticized by lawmakers on both sides of the aisle.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: Here's the top 25 list of most-viewed Wikipedia articles of 2024
item.description: We collectively spent an estimated 2.4 billion hours reading English-language articles on Wikipedia in 2024, and we now know which were the most popular.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Adams, Fox 5

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez first person to hit a million followers on Bluesky
item.description: The platform’s features are based off of Twitter, and they include the ability to message fellow users as well as a discover and feed tab.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Taco Bell adding photo booth experience to drive-thrus nationwide for a limited time
item.description: Select Taco Bell drive-thrus nationwide will be transformed into a “one of a kind” photo booth experience to capture fans’ everyday “Live Mas” moments. Taco Bell rewards members in California, Ohio, Tennessee, Texas and Florida will be able to participate in the drive-thru photo booth experience.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: GM recalls over 130,000 trucks over unexpected tailgate unlatching
item.description: Over 132,000 Chevrolet and GMC trucks are facing a recall over concerns that the tailgate may unlatch unexpectedly.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida woman who left boyfriend in zipped suitcase for hours sentenced in his death
item.description: She was “shocked” by the guilty verdict and thought maybe the jury would convict her of a lesser charge, her lawyer said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, WGN 9

item.title: Supreme Court doesn't seem convinced FDA was unfair in blocking flavored vapes as teen use increased
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A majority of Supreme Court justices didn't seem convinced Monday that federal regulators misled companies before refusing to allow them to sell sweet-flavored vaping products following a surge in teen e-cigarette use.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Zach Bryan fan strikes lottery gold during marathon concert road trip
item.description: A whirlwind road trip to see country music star Zach Bryan in concert ended on an even higher note for a California mother and her teen son, thanks to a winning lottery ticket.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Already buried under snow, Great Lakes region expected to see more stormy weather this week
item.description: Snow continued to fall Monday around parts of the Great Lakes region, where storm-weary residents who have plowed and shoveled for days faced the prospect of even greater accumulations.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL HILL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Most fun cities in U.S. Ranked. Here's where Los Angeles landed
item.description: Do Angelenos have the most fun? Well, it might depend on your idea of a good time. A new study by Wallet Hub ranked Los Angeles 18th on its list of Most Fun Cities in America but the City of Angels did finish first in a couple of key metrics.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5
